no: Imoen Romance v4. The newer version by different authors is well-regarded. Install after any mod that modifies Imoen dialogue (specifically force-talk mods), but before new NPC mods (because of solar end talk). Website moved to israelbarbuzano.net/imoen/ in March 2026. Source now on GitHub.

a: Lord Mirrabbo, T.C. Dale, TheAcefes, Sarevok8, Vanatos, elyon
sum: Adds a full romance path for Imoen in BG2/ToB. Develops the childhood friend relationship into romance with extensive, sensitive dialogue.
